description_en: Detroit may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 29 halal restaurants and 16 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Detroit, the United States, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Detroit: 33 halal restaurants listed, 16 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.2/5.
